title: Deadfast Mouse and Rat Killer Plus Poison, 15 Block - Green
features: Mouse and rat killer Blocks contains an advanced active ingredient (difethialone) that currently has no known resistance in rodents
Product is formulated to ensure rodents consume a lethal does the first time, making this bait ideal even for high infestations
Product is ready to use and can be used indoors and outdoors
Blocks are stable at a wide temperature range (-15° to +50 degree Celsius) and are easy to spike, rod and replace
Pack contains 15 Blocks (house mouse low infestations apply 2 Blocks sachets every 2- 3 meters)
description: From the manufacturer Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus Blocks Kills in a Single Dose Our baits use the most innovative anticoagulant in the market, called Difethialone. This active ingredient has no known genetic resistant in rodents and is proven to be effective at a low concentration (25ppm), ensuring rodents consume a lethal dose the first time. That’s why you can use our baits with confidence for any rodent infestation. The bait blocks are made with a mix of whole grain and low wax content, to perform under difficult high moisture conditions and dust. They are easy to spike, rod and replace and they resist a wide temperature range (-15°C to +50°C), making them our most reliable and long lasting bait. Key Benefits: Kills in a single dose Advanced active ingredient, effective at 25ppm All weather bait blocks For use indoors & outdoors around buildings Ridge cut blocks to encourage gnawing/ consumption No need to unwrap Ready-to-use Blocks Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus Blocks combines the efficacy of our active ingredient with a long lasting bait. It also has good palatability for enhanced performance. Ridge cut block encourages gnawing, a common rodent behaviour Low wax content for lighter texture Made with whole grains Resistant to high moisture environments Stable at a wide range of temperatures (-15°C to +50°C) Chew-through wrap How to Use Tips Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus Blocks can be used indoor or outdoors around buildings. The baits MUST be placed inside a tamper resistant bait station by law, to protect and avoid children, pets and wildlife accessing the bait. When placing the station, make sure its secured so it can’t be dragged away. To maximize success, remove any food competition like grains or food waste. Apart from this, do not clean up the area before the treatment, as this only disturbs the rodent environment and makes bait acceptance more difficult to achieve. Before using, please READ ALL THE INSTUCTIONS OF USE, to make sure the right bait distance and quantity is used, depending on level of infestation and type of rodent. To dispose of the dead rodent, use gloves and tools such as tongs to make sure you don’t touch the rodent. Use a double plastic bag to dispose and place in a waste bin with a secure lid to prevent access of wildlife or pets. Always read the full label and product information before use .
